hero.title: About Vasty
hero.subtitle: Revolutionizing online shopping through innovation, quality, and unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction

story.title: Making Commerce Better for Everyone
story.p1: Founded in 2024, Vasty emerged from a simple yet powerful vision: to give everyone the tools they need to start, run, and grow a business. We believe entrepreneurship should be accessible to all—whether you're launching your first store or scaling globally.
story.p2: Our journey began when our founders realized that starting an online business was still too complicated. We set out to change that by building a platform that handles everything—from building your storefront to processing payments to shipping worldwide.
story.p3: Today, Vasty powers businesses of all sizes in every industry. From independent creators to global brands, merchants trust us to be the backbone of their business. We handle the complexity so you can focus on what matters most: your products and customers.
story.p4: Our mission is to make commerce better for everyone. We're building the tools, infrastructure, and support that help entrepreneurs succeed—today and for generations to come.

values.title: What We Stand For
values.subtitle: Our core values guide every decision we make and shape the experience we deliver to our customers

qualityFirst.title: Quality First
qualityFirst.description: We partner with premium brands and carefully curate every product to ensure the highest standards of quality and craftsmanship.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: Environmental responsibility is at our core. We're committed to sustainable practices, eco-friendly packaging, and carbon-neutral operations.

customerObsession.title: Customer Obsession
customerObsession.description: Your satisfaction drives everything we do. From personalized recommendations to 24/7 support, we're dedicated to exceeding your expectations.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We leverage cutting-edge technology and smart tools to revolutionize your shopping and selling experience.

stats.title: Our Impact in Numbers
stats.subtitle: These numbers represent the trust you've placed in us and the community we've built together

team.title: Meet Our Leadership
team.subtitle: Passionate individuals dedicated to revolutionizing your shopping experience

sustainability.title: Our Commitment to the Planet
sustainability.description: At Vasty, we believe that great products shouldn't come at the planet's expense. That's why sustainability is woven into every aspect of our business—from the products we offer to how we deliver them to your door.

carbonNeutralShipping.title: Carbon Neutral Shipping
carbonNeutralShipping.description: All deliveries are offset through our partnership with verified carbon reduction projects worldwide.

recyclablePackaging.title: 100% Recyclable Packaging
recyclablePackaging.description: Our packaging materials are fully recyclable and made from post-consumer recycled content.

ethicalSourcing.title: Ethical Sourcing
ethicalSourcing.description: We work exclusively with suppliers who meet our strict ethical and environmental standards.

sustainableMaterials.title: Sustainable Materials
sustainableMaterials.description: We prioritize products made from organic, recycled, and sustainably sourced materials.

carbonNeutralCertified.title: Certified Carbon Neutral
carbonNeutralCertified.description: We've achieved carbon neutrality across our entire operation and continue to invest in renewable energy and reforestation projects.

cta.title: Join Our Journey
cta.description: Build your future with Vasty. Start your business today—no experience needed. Your journey to success starts here.
cta.subscribeText: Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive deals, new arrivals, and style tips

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about shopping, shipping, returns, and more
faq.question: question

stillNeedHelp.title: Still Need Help?

placeOrder.question: How do I place an order?
placeOrder.answer: Simply browse our products, add items to your cart, and proceed to checkout. You can pay using various payment methods.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and cash on delivery for select areas.

shippingTime.question: How long does shipping take?
shippingTime.answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping is available for 2-3 business days delivery.

returnPolicy.question: What is your return policy?
returnPolicy.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused items in original packaging. Contact our support team to initiate a return.

trackOrder.question: How can I track my order?
trackOrder.answer: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also track your order from your account page.

internationalShipping.question: Do you ship internationally?
internationalShipping.answer: Yes, we ship to most countries. International shipping times and costs vary by destination.

trackOrder.question: How do I track my order?
trackOrder.answer: Once your order ships, you will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number and a link to track your package. You can also track your order by logging into your account and visiting the "My Orders" section. Real-time tracking updates are available 24/7, showing you exactly where your package is in transit.

shippingOptions.question: What are the shipping options?
shippingOptions.answer: We offer several shipping options to meet your needs: Standard Shipping (5-7 business days, FREE on orders over $50), Express Shipping (2-3 business days, $12.99), Next Day Delivery (1 business day, $24.99), and International Shipping (7-21 business days, varies by location). Shipping times are calculated from the date of shipment, not the order date.

internationalShipping.question: Do you ship internationally?
internationalShipping.answer: Yes! We ship to over 100 countries worldwide. International shipping costs and delivery times vary by destination. Customs duties, taxes, and fees may apply and are the responsibility of the recipient. Please note that some products may have shipping restrictions based on local regulations.

shippingTime.question: How long does shipping take?
shippingTime.answer: Shipping times vary based on your selected shipping method and destination. Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days, Express shipping takes 2-3 business days, and Next Day delivery arrives within 1 business day. International orders typically arrive within 7-21 business days depending on customs clearance and destination.

lostDamaged.question: What if my package is lost or damaged?
lostDamaged.answer: We take full responsibility for packages that are lost or damaged in transit. If your package shows as delivered but you have not received it, please wait 24 hours and check with neighbors. If still missing, contact our customer service team immediately. For damaged items, please take photos and submit them through our Returns Portal within 48 hours for a full refund or replacement.

changeAddress.question: Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
changeAddress.answer: If your order has not yet shipped, you can update your shipping address by contacting customer service immediately. Once an order has shipped, we cannot redirect it to a new address. However, you can contact the shipping carrier directly with your tracking number to request a delivery change.

returnPolicy.question: What is your return policy?
returnPolicy.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy on most items. Products must be unused, unwashed, and in their original condition with all tags attached. Items marked as "Final Sale" or personalized products cannot be returned. Swimwear, underwear, and beauty products are also non-returnable for hygiene reasons.

howToReturn.question: How do I return an item?
howToReturn.answer: To return an item: 1) Log into your account and go to "Order History", 2) Select the order and click "Return Items", 3) Choose the items you wish to return and provide a reason, 4) Print the prepaid return shipping label provided, 5) Pack the items securely with all original packaging and tags, 6) Drop off at any authorized shipping location.

refundTime.question: When will I receive my refund?
refundTime.answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive and inspect your returned item. The refund will be issued to your original payment method. Please note that it may take an additional 3-5 business days for the refund to appear in your account, depending on your bank.

exchange.question: Can I exchange an item?
exchange.answer: Yes! We make exchanges easy. If you need a different size or color, initiate a return for the original item and place a new order for the replacement. This ensures you get your new item as quickly as possible. Exchange shipping is free for size/color swaps on non-sale items.

defectiveItem.question: What if I received a defective or wrong item?
defectiveItem.answer: We sincerely apologize if you received a defective or incorrect item. Please contact customer service within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the item and packaging. We will immediately send you a replacement at no charge with expedited shipping, or issue a full refund including original shipping costs.

sizeGuide.question: How do I know my size?
sizeGuide.answer: We provide detailed size charts for all products. Click on the "Size Guide" link available on every product page. Our size charts include measurements in both inches and centimeters, along with fit tips. We also offer a "True to Size" rating based on customer reviews.

authentic.question: Are all products authentic?
authentic.answer: Absolutely! We guarantee 100% authentic products. We source directly from authorized brand distributors and manufacturers. Every product comes with authenticity documentation when applicable. We have a zero-tolerance policy for counterfeit items.

restock.question: Do you restock sold-out items?
restock.answer: Many popular items are restocked regularly! You can sign up for restock notifications on any sold-out product page by clicking "Notify Me When Available." You will receive an email as soon as the item is back in stock. Some seasonal or limited-edition items may not be restocked.

preorder.question: Can I pre-order products?
preorder.answer: Yes, select upcoming products are available for pre-order. Pre-order items are clearly marked on the product page with an expected ship date. Your payment method will be charged when you place the pre-order. You can cancel a pre-order anytime before the item ships for a full refund.

inStock.question: How do I know if a product is in stock?
inStock.answer: Product availability is displayed in real-time on each product page. If an item shows as "In Stock," it is available for immediate purchase. Items marked "Low Stock" have limited quantities remaining. "Out of Stock" items cannot be purchased currently, but you can sign up for restock notifications.

careInstructions.question: Do products come with care instructions?
careInstructions.answer: Yes! All clothing and textile products include care tags with washing and maintenance instructions. Detailed care information is also available on each product page under the "Care Instructions" section.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Shop Pay. We also offer Klarna and Afterpay for buy-now-pay-later options on eligible purchases. Gift cards and store credit can also be applied during checkout.

paymentSecure.question: Is my payment information secure?
paymentSecure.answer: Absolutely! We take your security seriously. Our website uses industry-standard SSL encryption to protect your personal and payment information. We are PCI DSS compliant and never store your complete credit card information on our servers.

multiplePayment.question: Can I use multiple payment methods for one order?
multiplePayment.answer: Currently, you can use one primary payment method per order. However, you can combine a gift card or store credit with any payment method. If you need to split payment between multiple cards, please contact customer service and we can assist you.

paymentPlans.question: Do you offer payment plans?
paymentPlans.answer: Yes! We partner with Klarna and Afterpay to offer flexible payment plans. You can split your purchase into 4 interest-free payments over 6 weeks, or choose longer-term financing options for eligible purchases over $100.

paymentDeclined.question: Why was my payment declined?
paymentDeclined.answer: Payment declines can occur for several reasons: insufficient funds, incorrect card information, expired card, billing address mismatch, or security holds from your bank. Please verify your payment details and try again. If the problem persists, contact your bank or try a different payment method.

createAccount.question: How do I create an account?
createAccount.answer: Creating an account is quick and easy! Click "Sign Up" or "Create Account" at the top of any page. Enter your email address, create a secure password, and provide your basic information. You can also sign up using your Google or Facebook account.

forgotPassword.question: I forgot my password. What should I do?
forgotPassword.answer: No problem! Click "Forgot Password?" on the login page. Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link within a few minutes. Click the link in the email and follow the prompts to create a new password.

updateAccount.question: How do I update my account information?
updateAccount.answer: Log into your account and click on "Account Settings" or "Profile." From there, you can update your personal information, email address, password, shipping addresses, and payment methods. Changes are saved automatically.

deleteAccount.question: Can I delete my account?
deleteAccount.answer: Yes, you have the right to delete your account at any time. Go to Account Settings and select "Delete Account" at the bottom of the page. Please note that deleting your account is permanent and cannot be undone.

emailPreferences.question: How do I manage my email preferences?
emailPreferences.answer: You can manage all email preferences in your Account Settings under "Communication Preferences." Choose which types of emails you want to receive: order updates, promotional offers, new arrivals, sale notifications, and more.

physicalStores.question: Do you have physical stores?
physicalStores.answer: We are primarily an online retailer to bring you the best prices and widest selection. However, we do have flagship stores in select cities. Visit our "Store Locator" page to find the nearest location, hours, and directions.

contactService.question: How can I contact customer service?
contactService.answer: We are here to help! Contact us via: Live Chat (available 24/7 on our website), Email (support@vasty.shop, response within 24 hours), Phone (Monday-Friday 9AM-9PM EST, Saturday-Sunday 10AM-6PM EST), or Social Media (DM us on Instagram, Facebook, or Twitter).

giftCards.question: Do you offer gift cards?
giftCards.answer: Yes! Our gift cards are the perfect gift for anyone who loves shopping. Available in denominations from $25 to $500, our gift cards never expire and have no fees. You can purchase e-gift cards for instant delivery via email, or physical gift cards shipped in a beautiful presentation box.

promotions.question: Are there any promotions or discount codes?
promotions.answer: We regularly offer promotions, sales, and exclusive discounts! Sign up for our email newsletter to receive a 15% off welcome code and be the first to know about upcoming sales. Follow us on social media for special promo codes and limited-time discounts.

priceMatch.question: What is your price match policy?
priceMatch.answer: We want you to get the best value! If you find an identical item at a lower price from an authorized online competitor, contact us within 7 days of purchase with proof of the lower price. We will refund the difference if the item is in stock and the competitor is an authorized retailer.

howItWorks.subtitle: Whether you're a seller or buyer, we've made the experience seamless and powerful.
howItWorks.forSellersDesc: Launch and grow your online business

step1.title: Create Your Store
step1.description: Set up your branded storefront in minutes with our AI-powered builder. No coding required.

step2.title: Add Your Products
step2.description: Upload products with AI-enhanced descriptions, SEO optimization, and smart categorization.

step3.title: Get Discovered
step3.description: Your products appear in our marketplace. Customers find you through our powerful discovery engine.

step4.title: Grow & Scale
step4.description: Leverage our tools to grow your business. Analytics, marketing, and customer management included.

step1.description: Browse products from verified sellers in one unified, beautiful marketplace.

step2.title: Discover Stores
step2.description: Find unique stores with curated products. Each store has its own brand and identity.

step3.title: Shop Seamlessly
step3.description: Unified cart across stores. Secure checkout with multiple payment options.

step4.title: Connect & Review
step4.description: Rate products, follow stores, and help the community discover the best sellers.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: The best of both worlds: marketplace discovery + independent storefronts. Plus AI-powered tools that make running your business effortless.

marketplaceDiscovery.title: Marketplace Discovery
marketplaceDiscovery.description: Unlike Shopify, your products are discoverable in our central marketplace. Get traffic without paying for ads.

independentStorefronts.title: Independent Storefronts
independentStorefronts.description: Unlike Amazon, you own your brand. Custom domain, unique design, your customers.

aiStoreBuilder.title: AI Store Builder
aiStoreBuilder.description: Describe your store in words. Our AI builds it in seconds. No coding, no design skills needed.

integratedPayments.title: Integrated Payments
integratedPayments.description: Stripe Connect built-in. Accept payments globally with just 0.5% platform fee.

powerfulAnalytics.title: Powerful Analytics
powerfulAnalytics.description: Real-time insights into your business. Sales, customers, products - all in one dashboard.

deliveryManagement.title: Delivery Management
deliveryManagement.description: Built-in delivery partner network. Track orders, manage shipping, delight customers.

features.lightningFastDesc: Optimized for speed. Your store loads in milliseconds.
features.globalScaleDesc: Serve customers worldwide with CDN delivery.

marketplacePreview.title: Discover Amazing
marketplacePreview.subtitle: Browse products from multiple stores. All in one place.

pricing.title: Save
pricing.subtitle: Get marketplace traffic + all the tools included. No hidden fees, no expensive add-ons.

comparison.savingsDescription: A store doing $10K/month saves $250/month compared to Shopify

cta.title: Your Empire Awaits.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.description: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time.

questions.title: Questions?
questions.description: Contact our privacy team for any concerns.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.p1: At Vasty ("we," "our," or "us"), we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website, mobile application, or use our services (collectively, the "Service").
introduction.p2: This Privacy Policy applies to all information collected through our Service and any related services, sales, marketing, or events. Please read this Privacy Policy carefully. By using our Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
introduction.p3: If you do not agree with the terms of this Privacy Policy, please do not access or use our Service. We reserve the right to make changes to this Privacy Policy at any time and for any reason. We will alert you about any changes by updating the "Last Updated" date of this Privacy Policy.
introduction.p4: This Privacy Policy complies with applicable privacy laws and regulations, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), and other relevant data protection legislation.

informationWeCollect.title: 2. Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.personalInfoDesc: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register on the Service, make a purchase, subscribe to our newsletter, or otherwise contact us. The personal information we collect may include:
personalInfoList: Name and contact information (email address, phone number, mailing address)
Demographic information (age, gender, date of birth)
Social media profile information (when you connect social accounts)
informationWeCollect.paymentInfoDesc: When you make a purchase, we collect payment information necessary to process your transaction. This may include:
paymentInfoList: Credit card or debit card numbers (tokenized and encrypted)
PayPal account information or other payment service details
informationWeCollect.paymentInfoNote: Please note that we do not store your complete credit card information on our servers. All payment information is processed securely through third-party payment processors that comply with Payment Card Industry Data Security Standards (PCI DSS).
informationWeCollect.autoCollectedDesc: When you access our Service, we automatically collect certain information about your device and usage patterns, including:
autoCollectedList: Device type, operating system, and unique device identifiers
Pages visited, time spent on pages, and navigation paths
Click-through data and interaction with features

howWeUse.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: We use the information we collect for various purposes, including:
list: To process your orders: We use your information to fulfill and manage purchases, payments, returns, and exchanges
To communicate with you: We send order confirmations, shipping updates, customer service responses, and account notifications
To personalize your experience: We tailor product recommendations, content, and marketing based on your preferences and behavior
To improve our Service: We analyze usage data to enhance features, optimize performance, and develop new products
To send marketing communications: With your consent, we send promotional emails, special offers, and newsletters
To prevent fraud and ensure security: We monitor for suspicious activity and protect against unauthorized access
To comply with legal obligations: We process data as required by law, including tax reporting and regulatory compliance
To conduct analytics and research: We aggregate and analyze data to understand trends and customer behavior
To facilitate social features: We enable features like wishlists, reviews, and social sharing
To administer promotions and contests: We manage participation in special events and promotional campaigns
howWeUse.outro: We process your personal information for these purposes based on our legitimate business interests, to fulfill our contract with you, with your consent, or to comply with our legal obligations.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies & Tracking Technologies
cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our Service and store certain information. Cookies are small data files stored on your device that help us improve your experience, understand usage patterns, and deliver targeted content.
typesList: Essential Cookies: Necessary for the Service to function properly, including authentication, security, and shopping cart functionality
Performance Cookies: Help us understand how visitors interact with our Service by collecting anonymous usage data
Functional Cookies: Remember your preferences and settings to enhance your experience
Targeting/Advertising Cookies: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaign effectiveness
Analytics Cookies: Allow us to analyze visitor behavior and improve our Service (e.g., Google Analytics)
cookies.managingDesc: You can control and manage cookies in various ways. Most browsers allow you to refuse or delete cookies. Please note that if you choose to disable cookies, some features of our Service may not function properly.
cookies.managingNote: To opt-out of interest-based advertising, you can visit the Digital Advertising Alliance's opt-out portal or the Network Advertising Initiative's opt-out portal. For mobile devices, you can adjust your advertising preferences in your device settings.
cookies.cookieConsentDesc: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through our Cookie Settings in the footer of our website or by clicking the "Manage Cookies" button.

sharing.title: 5. Sharing Your Information
sharing.intro: We may share your information in the following situations:
list: Service Providers: We share information with third-party vendors who perform services on our behalf, such as payment processing, shipping, email delivery, analytics, marketing, and customer service. These providers are contractually obligated to protect your information and use it only for the purposes we specify.
Business Transfers: In connection with any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business, your information may be transferred to the acquiring entity.

Legal Requirements: We may disclose your information if required by law, court order, or governmental request, or when we believe disclosure is necessary to protect our rights, your safety, or the safety of others.
With Your Consent: We may share your information for any other purpose with your explicit consent.
Aggregated Data: We may share aggregated or anonymized data that cannot identify you personally for research, marketing, or analytical purposes.
Affiliated Companies: We may share information with our parent company, subsidiaries, and affiliates for business purposes consistent with this Privacy Policy.
sharing.noSell: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We do not share your information with unaffiliated third parties for their own marketing purposes without your consent.

security.title: 6. Data Security
security.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures designed to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction. These measures include:
list: Encryption of data in transit using SSL/TLS protocols
Encryption of sensitive data at rest
Regular security assessments and vulnerability testing
Access controls and authentication requirements
Employee training on data protection and privacy
Secure data centers with physical and environmental controls
Regular backups and disaster recovery procedures
Incident response and breach notification procedures
security.disclaimer: However, please note that no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your personal information, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
security.responsibility: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. Please notify us immediately if you become aware of any unauthorized access to or use of your account.

rights.title: 7. Your Privacy Rights
rights.intro: Depending on your location and applicable laws, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information:
rights.gdprIntro: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):
gdprList: Right to Access: You can request access to your personal information and obtain a copy of the data we hold about you
Right to Rectification: You can request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal information
Right to Erasure: You can request deletion of your personal information under certain circumstances
Right to Restrict Processing: You can request that we limit the processing of your personal information
Right to Data Portability: You can request a copy of your data in a structured, machine-readable format
Right to Object: You can object to the processing of your personal information for certain purposes
Right to Withdraw Consent: Where processing is based on consent, you can withdraw your consent at any time
Right to Lodge a Complaint: You can file a complaint with your local data protection authority
rights.ccpaIntro: If you are a California resident, you have the following rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA):
ccpaList: Right to Know: You can request information about the categories and specific pieces of personal information we have collected about you
Right to Delete: You can request deletion of your personal information, subject to certain exceptions
Right to Opt-Out: You can opt-out of the sale of your personal information (we do not sell personal information)
Right to Non-Discrimination: You have the right not to receive discriminatory treatment for exercising your CCPA rights
rights.exercisingIntro: To exercise any of your privacy rights, you can:
exercisingList: Use the data request forms linked below
rights.responseTime: We will respond to your request within 30 days. We may need to verify your identity before processing your request.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.p1: Our Service is not intended for children under 13 years of age (or under 16 in the EEA). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under these ages. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us at support@vasty.shop.
children.p2: If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child under the applicable age without verification of parental consent, we will take steps to delete that information from our servers promptly.
children.p3: We encourage parents and guardians to monitor their children's Internet usage and help enforce this Privacy Policy by instructing their children never to provide personal information through our Service without their permission.

international.title: 9. International Data Transfers
international.p1: Your information, including personal information, may be transferred to and maintained on computers located outside of your state, province, country, or other governmental jurisdiction where data protection laws may differ from those in your jurisdiction.
international.p2: If you are located outside the United States and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the information, including personal information, to the United States and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer.
international.p3: We will take all steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy. We use appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission for transfers of personal information from the EEA to countries that do not provide adequate protection.

thirdParty.title: 10. Third-Party Links
thirdParty.p1: Our Service may contain links to third-party websites, applications, or services that are not operated by us. If you click on a third-party link, you will be directed to that third party's site. We strongly advise you to review the privacy policy of every site you visit.
thirdParty.p2: We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party sites or services. We do not warrant the offerings of any of these entities/individuals or their websites.
thirdParty.p3: Some examples of third-party services we may link to or integrate with include:
list: Social media platforms (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Pinterest)
Payment processors (PayPal, Stripe, Square)
Shipping carriers (UPS, FedEx, USPS)
Analytics services (Google Analytics, Mixpanel)
Customer service platforms (Zendesk, Intercom)
Email marketing services (Mailchimp, SendGrid)

retention.title: 11. Data Retention
retention.intro: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law. The criteria we use to determine retention periods include:
criteriaList: The length of time we have an ongoing relationship with you and provide our Service
Whether there is a legal obligation to which we are subject (e.g., tax, accounting, or legal requirements)
Whether retention is advisable in light of our legal position (e.g., regarding statutes of limitations, litigation, or regulatory investigations)
periodsList: Account Information: Retained while your account is active and for 3 years after account closure
Purchase History: Retained for 7 years for tax and accounting purposes
Marketing Data: Retained until you opt-out or request deletion
Customer Service Records: Retained for 3 years after the last interaction
Website Analytics: Typically aggregated and anonymized after 26 months
retention.outro: After the retention period expires, we will securely delete or anonymize your personal information in accordance with applicable law.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Privacy Policy
changes.p1: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, legal requirements, or other factors. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of this Privacy Policy.
changes.p2: For material changes, we will provide additional notice, which may include:
list: Sending you an email notification to the address associated with your account
Displaying a prominent notice on our website or mobile application
Requesting your consent for the changes where required by law
changes.p3: We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we are protecting your information. Your continued use of our Service after we post any modifications to the Privacy Policy will constitute your acknowledgment of the modifications and your consent to abide by the modified Privacy Policy.

contact.title: 13. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us:
contact.hours: Hours: Monday - Friday, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST
contact.commitment: We are committed to resolving complaints about your privacy and our collection or use of your personal information. We will investigate and attempt to resolve complaints and disputes in accordance with the principles described in this Privacy Policy.
contact.euComplaint: For EU users, you also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local supervisory authority if you believe we have not adequately addressed your concerns.

privacy.introText: This Privacy Policy describes how Vasty ("we," "our," or "us") collects, uses, and shares your personal information when you visit or make a purchase from our e-commerce platform. We are committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about our data practices. This policy complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), and other applicable privacy laws.
privacy.footerNote: By using Vasty, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy. If you have any questions or concerns about how we handle your personal information, please contact our Privacy Officer at support@vasty.shop. We are committed to addressing your privacy concerns promptly and transparently.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our services

needHelp.title: Need Help?
needHelp.description: Have questions about our terms? Our legal team is here to help.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.p1: Welcome to Vasty ("we," "our," or "us"). These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Vasty website, mobile applications, and related services (collectively, the "Service"). By accessing or using our Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
introduction.p2: Please read these Terms carefully before using our Service. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Service. We reserve the right to update, change, or replace any part of these Terms by posting updates and changes to our website. It is your responsibility to check our website periodically for changes.
introduction.p3: Your continued use of or access to our Service following the posting of any changes to these Terms constitutes acceptance of those changes. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who wish to access or use our Service.

acceptance.title: 2. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.p1: By creating an account, placing an order, or otherwise using our Service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms, as well as our Privacy Policy. If you are using our Service on behalf of an organization, you are agreeing to these Terms for that organization and representing that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.
acceptance.p2: You must be at least 18 years of age to use our Service. By using our Service, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms. If you are under 18, you may use our Service only with the involvement and consent of a parent or legal guardian.
acceptance.p3: We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders at our sole discretion, including but not limited to situations where we believe there has been a violation of these Terms or any applicable law.

useOfWebsite.title: 3. Use of the Website
useOfWebsite.permittedP1: Subject to your compliance with these Terms, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to access and use our Service for your personal, non-commercial use. You may browse our products, place orders, create an account, and use the features we make available through our Service.
useOfWebsite.permittedP2: You agree to use our Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You are responsible for ensuring that your use of the Service complies with all applicable local, state, national, and international laws and regulations.
prohibitedList: Use the Service in any way that violates any applicable federal, state, local, or international law or regulation
Engage in any conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone's use or enjoyment of the Service, or which may harm Vasty or users of the Service
Use the Service to transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material, including any "junk mail," "chain letter," "spam," or any other similar solicitation
Impersonate or attempt to impersonate Vasty, a Vasty employee, another user, or any other person or entity
Engage in any automated use of the system, such as using scripts to send comments or messages, or using any data mining, robots, or similar data gathering and extraction tools
Interfere with, disrupt, or create an undue burden on the Service or the networks or services connected to the Service
Attempt to bypass any measures of the Service designed to prevent or restrict access to the Service, or any portion of the Service
Copy, modify, create derivative works of, reverse engineer, decompile, or otherwise attempt to extract the source code of the Service

Use the Service to harass, abuse, insult, harm, defame, slander, disparage, intimidate, or discriminate based on gender, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, race, age, national origin, or disability
Submit false or misleading information or upload malicious code, viruses, or any other harmful content

accountReg.title: 4. Account Registration
accountReg.creationP1: To access certain features of our Service, you may be required to create an account. When you create an account, you must provide accurate, complete, and current information. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of these Terms, which may result in immediate termination of your account.
accountReg.creationP2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, and you agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account.
accountReg.securityP1: You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity that is not lawfully available for use, or a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar, or obscene.
accountReg.securityP2: We reserve the right to refuse registration of, or cancel, a username in our sole discretion. You are solely responsible for all activity that occurs under your account, and you must keep your account password secure. We recommend using a strong password and enabling two-factor authentication where available.

products.title: 5. Product Information & Pricing
products.descriptionsP1: We make every effort to display as accurately as possible the colors, features, specifications, and details of the products available on our Service. However, we do not guarantee that product descriptions, colors, information, or other content available on our Service are accurate, complete, reliable, current, or error-free.
products.descriptionsP2: Product images are for illustrative purposes only and may not always be an exact representation of the product. We reserve the right to limit the quantities of any products that we offer and to discontinue any product at any time without notice.
products.pricingP1: All prices are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the Service (or any part or content thereof) without notice at any time. Prices for our products are subject to change without notice.
products.pricingP2: In the event of a pricing error, we reserve the right to refuse or cancel any orders placed for products listed at the incorrect price. We will notify you if this occurs and provide you with the option to wait for the item to be available at the correct price or cancel your order.
products.pricingP3: Some products may be available exclusively online through our Service. These products may have limited quantities and are subject to return or exchange only according to our Return Policy.

orders.title: 6. Orders & Payment
orders.acceptanceP1: All orders placed through our Service are subject to acceptance by Vasty. We reserve the right, in our sole discretion, to refuse or cancel any order for any reason, including but not limited to product availability, errors in product or pricing information, or problems identified by our fraud detection systems.
orders.acceptanceP2: Your receipt of an order confirmation does not signify our acceptance of your order, nor does it constitute confirmation of our offer to sell. We reserve the right to limit or prohibit orders that, in our sole judgment, appear to be placed by dealers, resellers, or distributors.
orders.methodsP1: We accept various payment methods including credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), debit cards, PayPal, and other payment methods as displayed during checkout. You agree to provide current, complete, and accurate purchase and account information for all purchases made via our Service.
orders.methodsP2: You agree to promptly update your account and payment information, including email address, payment method, and card expiration date, so that we can complete your transactions and contact you as needed. Sales tax will be added to the price of purchases as deemed required by us.
orders.securityP1: All payment transactions are processed through secure payment gateways that comply with industry-standard security protocols. We do not store your complete credit card information on our servers. Your payment information is encrypted and securely transmitted to our payment processors.
orders.securityP2: You authorize us to charge your payment method for the total amount of your order, including any applicable taxes and shipping charges. If your payment method cannot be verified, is invalid, or is not otherwise acceptable, your order may be suspended or cancelled.

shipping.title: 7. Shipping & Delivery
shipping.p1: We offer various shipping options at checkout, including standard, expedited, and express delivery. Shipping costs are calculated based on the delivery address, package weight, and selected shipping method. All delivery times are estimates and are not guaranteed.
shipping.p2: Once your order has shipped, you will receive a shipping confirmation email with tracking information. We are not responsible for delays caused by shipping carriers, customs clearance, or other factors outside our control. Title and risk of loss for all products pass to you upon delivery to the shipping carrier.
shipping.p3: For international orders, you may be subject to import duties and taxes, which are levied once the package reaches your country. Additional charges for customs clearance must be borne by you; we have no control over these charges. Customs policies vary widely from country to country, so you should contact your local customs office for further information.
shipping.p4: If you refuse to accept delivery of a package, we reserve the right to charge you for return shipping costs and a restocking fee. Packages that are returned to us as undeliverable due to incorrect address information provided by you may be subject to additional shipping charges for re-delivery.

returns.title: 8. Returns & Refunds
returns.p1: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you are not satisfied, you may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund or exchange. Items must be in their original condition with all tags attached and in their original packaging.
returns.p2: Certain items are not eligible for return, including but not limited to: intimate apparel, swimwear, earrings, final sale items, personalized items, and gift cards. All returns are subject to inspection, and we reserve the right to refuse returns that do not meet our return policy requirements.
returns.p3: To initiate a return, please contact our customer service team at support@vasty.shop with your order number and reason for return. We will provide you with a return authorization and instructions. Original shipping charges are non-refundable, and you are responsible for return shipping costs unless the return is due to our error.
returns.p4: Refunds will be processed within 5-10 business days of receiving your returned item and will be issued to the original payment method. If you received free shipping on your order, the cost of the shipping will be deducted from your refund. We recommend using a trackable shipping service or purchasing shipping insurance for returns, as we cannot guarantee receipt of your returned item.

ip.title: 9. Intellectual Property
ip.p1: The Service and its entire contents, features, and functionality (including but not limited to all information, software, text, displays, images, video, and audio, and the design, selection, and arrangement thereof) are owned by Vasty, its licensors, or other providers of such material and are protected by United States and international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property or proprietary rights laws.
ip.p2: The Vasty name, logo, and all related names, logos, product and service names, designs, and slogans are trademarks of Vasty or its affiliates or licensors. You must not use such marks without our prior written permission. All other names, logos, product and service names, designs, and slogans on this Service are the trademarks of their respective owners.
ip.p3: You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, republish, download, store, or transmit any of the material on our Service, except as generally and ordinarily permitted through the Service according to these Terms or as expressly authorized by us in writing.
ip.p4: If you believe that any content on our Service violates your intellectual property rights, please contact us at support@vasty.shop with detailed information about the alleged infringement. We will investigate and take appropriate action in accordance with applicable law.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PROVIDED BY LAW, IN NO EVENT WILL VASTY, ITS AFFILIATES, OR THEIR LICENSORS, SERVICE PROVIDERS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, OFFICERS, OR DIRECTORS BE LIABLE FOR DAMAGES OF ANY KIND, UNDER ANY LEGAL THEORY, ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH YOUR USE, OR INABILITY TO USE, THE SERVICE, ANY WEBSITES LINKED TO IT, ANY CONTENT ON THE SERVICE OR SUCH OTHER WEBSITES, INCLUDING ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, SPECIAL, INCIDENTAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES.
liability.p2: This includes but is not limited to personal injury, pain and suffering, emotional distress, loss of revenue, loss of profits, loss of business or anticipated savings, loss of use, loss of goodwill, loss of data, and whether caused by tort (including negligence), breach of contract, or otherwise, even if foreseeable.
liability.p3: The foregoing does not affect any liability that cannot be excluded or limited under applicable law. IN NO EVENT SHALL OUR TOTAL LIABILITY TO YOU FOR ALL DAMAGES, LOSSES, AND CAUSES OF ACTION EXCEED THE AMOUNT PAID BY YOU TO VASTY IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRIOR TO THE EVENT GIVING RISE TO LIABILITY, OR ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($100), WHICHEVER IS GREATER.
liability.p4: Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of certain damages, so some of the above exclusions and limitations may not apply to you. In such jurisdictions, our liability will be limited to the greatest extent permitted by law.

disputes.title: 11. Dispute Resolution
disputes.informalP1: If you have any dispute with us, you agree to first contact us at support@vasty.shop and attempt to resolve the dispute with us informally. We will attempt to resolve any disputes through informal negotiations in good faith. Both parties agree to make reasonable efforts to settle any dispute, claim, question, or disagreement directly through consultation with one another.
disputes.arbitrationP1: If we cannot resolve the dispute through informal negotiations, any legal dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms or the Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the Commercial Arbitration Rules of the American Arbitration Association. The arbitration will be conducted in English in the United States.
disputes.arbitrationP2: You agree to waive your right to a jury trial and to participate in a class action lawsuit or class-wide arbitration. The arbitrator's decision will be final and binding, and judgment on the award may be entered in any court having jurisdiction.
disputes.arbitrationP3: Notwithstanding the foregoing, either party may seek injunctive or other equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction to prevent the actual or threatened infringement, misappropriation, or violation of a party's copyrights, trademarks, trade secrets, patents, or other intellectual property rights.

changes.title: 12. Changes to Terms
changes.p1: We reserve the right to update, change, or replace any part of these Terms at any time at our sole discretion. It is your responsibility to check our website periodically for changes. Your continued use of or access to the Service following the posting of any changes constitutes acceptance of those changes.
changes.p2: When we make material changes to these Terms, we will notify you by updating the "Last Updated" date at the top of these Terms and, where appropriate, by sending you an email notification or by posting a notice on our website. We encourage you to review these Terms whenever you access the Service or otherwise interact with us to stay informed about our terms and conditions.
changes.p3: If you do not agree to the modified Terms, you must discontinue your use of the Service. The amended Terms will be effective immediately upon posting for new users and thirty (30) days after posting for existing users, except for changes required by law which will be effective immediately.

contact.title: 13. Contact Information
contact.intro: If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback about these Terms or our Service, please contact us:
contact.hours: Hours: Monday - Friday, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST
contact.responseTime: We strive to respond to all inquiries within 1-2 business days. For urgent matters, please call our customer service line. Our team is committed to providing you with excellent service and addressing any concerns you may have.
contact.privacyNote: For privacy-related inquiries, please refer to our Privacy Policy or contact our Privacy Officer at support@vasty.shop.

terms.introText: These Terms and Conditions constitute a legally binding agreement made between you, whether personally or on behalf of an entity ("you"), and Vasty ("we," "us," or "our"), concerning your access to and use of the Vasty e-commerce platform and related services. By accessing the Service, you agree that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by all of these Terms and Conditions.
terms.footerNote: By using Vasty, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these Terms and Conditions and agree to be bound by them. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact our legal department at support@vasty.shop.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: Learn how we use cookies to improve your experience

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences, analyzing site traffic, and personalizing content.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Required for the website to function properly. They enable basic functions like page navigation and access to secure areas.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements.

preference.title: Preference Cookies
preference.description: Allow the website to remember choices you make and provide enhanced features.

managing.title: Managing Cookies
managing.content1: You can control and manage cookies in your browser settings. Please note that removing or blocking cookies may impact your user experience and some functionality may no longer be available.
managing.content2: Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or alert you when cookies are being sent. Refer to your browser's help section to learn how to change your cookie preferences.

cookies.moreInfo: For more information about how we handle your data, please read our Privacy Policy.

dataDeletion.title: Data Deletion Request
dataDeletion.subtitle: Request the permanent deletion of your personal data from our platform.
dataDeletion.warningContent: Data deletion is permanent and irreversible. Once processed, all your personal data will be permanently removed from our systems and cannot be recovered. This includes your account, order history, and all associated information.

submit.title: Submit Request
submit.description: Fill out the data deletion request form with your registered email address.

verification.title: Verification
verification.description: We'll send a verification email to confirm your identity and request.

processing.title: Processing
processing.description: Your request will be processed within 30 days as per GDPR requirements.

confirmation.title: Confirmation
confirmation.description: You'll receive confirmation once your data has been permanently deleted.

account.title: Account Information
account.description: Name, email, phone number, profile picture

activity.title: Activity Data
activity.description: Browsing history, search queries, click data

success.title: Request Submitted Successfully
success.message: We've received your data deletion request. You'll receive a verification email shortly. Please check your inbox and follow the instructions to confirm your request.
success.processingNote: Your request will be processed within 30 days of verification.

form.deleteFromProfile: You can also delete your account directly from your
form.emailHint: Enter the email address associated with your account.
form.reasonPlaceholder: Please let us know why you're requesting data deletion...
form.consent: I understand that data deletion is permanent and irreversible. All my personal data, including account information, order history, and preferences will be permanently deleted.

alternatives.title: Before You Go
alternatives.intro: Not sure about deleting your account? Consider these alternatives:
alternatives.download: Download your data - Export a copy of your personal data before deletion
alternatives.deactivate: Deactivate temporarily - Pause your account instead of deleting it permanently
alternatives.updatePrefs: Update preferences - Adjust privacy settings and marketing preferences

needHelp.title: Need Help?
needHelp.content: If you have any questions about data deletion or need assistance, please contact our privacy team.

sitemap.title: Site Map
sitemap.subtitle: Find everything you need on Vasty. Browse all pages and sections of our platform.

cantFind.title: Can't find what you're looking for?
cantFind.description: Use our search feature to find products, stores, or information quickly.

tracking.enterOrderNumberHint: Enter your order number or tracking ID to see real-time updates
tracking.orderNotFound: Order not found. Please check your tracking number.
tracking.notificationsEnabled: Notifications enabled! You will receive updates.
tracking.contactSupportDesc: Our customer service team is here to help with any questions about your order.
tracking.step1Desc: Enter your order number (found in your confirmation email) or tracking ID in the search box above.
tracking.step2Desc: See real-time updates on your order's journey from our warehouse to your doorstep.
tracking.step3Desc: Enable notifications to receive updates via email and SMS throughout the delivery process.
tracking.faq1Question: Where can I find my order number?
tracking.faq3Question: Can I change my shipping address?

vendor.addFirstProduct: Add your first product to get started
vendor.noShopFoundMessage: No shop found. Please create a shop first.

vendorProfile.title: My Profile
vendorProfile.deleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account, all of your data including shops and products will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
vendorProfile.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data.
vendorProfile.deleteAccountItems: Your profile, shops, products, orders, and earnings records will be deleted.
vendorProfile.deleteAccountFailed: Failed to delete account. Please contact support.

earnings.subtitle: Track your earnings and withdraw funds
earnings.cashWithdrawalNote: Cash withdrawals will be handed to you by the admin. Please visit the office to collect.

delivery.happeningToday: Here's what's happening with your deliveries today.
delivery.noPendingDeliveryOrders: No pending delivery orders at the moment
delivery.confirmDeclineOrder: Are you sure you want to decline order
delivery.maxConcurrentOrdersDesc: Maximum orders to handle at once

zones.contactVendor: Contact your vendor to be assigned a delivery zone
zones.receiveOrdersInZone: You will receive orders from this zone
zones.zoneAssignedByVendor: Your delivery zone is assigned by the vendor
zones.contactVendorToChange: Contact your vendor to change your zone
zones.zonesWillAppearHere: Your assigned delivery zones will appear here

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: You don't have any notifications yet. New order updates will appear here.

reviews.deliverMore: Complete more deliveries to receive reviews

delivery.cashWithdrawalInfo: Cash withdrawals will be handed to you by the admin. Please visit the office to collect.
delivery.bannerPickedUp: Picked Up - Ready to start delivery
delivery.bannerOnTheWay: On The Way - Heading to customer
delivery.confirmRejectOrder: Are you sure you want to reject this delivery order?

delivery.youAreOnDelivery: You are currently on a delivery
delivery.privacySecurityDesc: Manage your privacy and security settings
delivery.reviewsWillAppear: Reviews from customers will appear here after deliveries

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information
profile.deleteWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
profile.deleteConfirmMessage: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.
profile.deleteItem1: All your delivery history will be deleted
profile.deleteItem2: Your earnings data will be removed
profile.deleteItem3: You will lose access to this account
